title: notification-dispatched event — v1 wire contract
description: FROZEN wire shape for the `notifications::NotificationDispatched` event. This is the primary observability + fan-out event of the notifications substrate — every channel module (mail / push / sms / in-app) subscribes to it. The event is event-carried-state: the payload includes everything a channel module needs to deliver without a callback into notifications core. Every consumer reads this shape unchanged; breaking changes require a v2 per the versioning policy in `foundation/readme.md` §12.

x-versioning.policy: Same policy as workspace-provisioned.v1 — additive changes stay in v1; breaking changes create v2 with parallel dispatch. The `recipient` + `workspace` denormalised blocks are the most likely to gain fields; new optional properties are non-breaking and land in v1 unchanged.

notification_id.description: The Notification row's primary key. Channel modules dedupe on this.

application_id.description: Optional — present when the notification is scoped to a specific Application within the workspace.

category_slug.description: Module-namespaced category slug (e.g. `invitations.invitation_sent`, `billing.invoice_paid`). Drives per-user + per-workspace channel + consent gating.

template_key.description: Template key resolved by TemplateRegistry. Typically matches category_slug.

priority.description: Category's compliance priority tier. NEVER downgraded per-notification — flows from category default.

channels_requested.description: Subset of channels resolved from per-user preferences + per-workspace overrides. Each channel module short-circuits when its channel is absent.

id.description: User ULID. Null for anonymous / invite-by-email recipients.

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. `Europe/Paris`). Used for quiet-hours + scheduled sends.

consent_age_gate.description: Consent tier from GDPR Art. 8 + COPPA. Marketing categories short-circuit for `minor_under_consent_age`.

workspace.description: Denormalised workspace branding context. Channel modules use this to render sender identity + branded email footer without a callback.

dispatched_at.description: When the Notification row was created + the fan-out began. Typically equal to occurred_at.

unsubscribe_token.description: Signed token for RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe-Post. Present when the category's consent_tier permits unsubscribe (product / marketing); null for transactional_required.
